name: MAG-7 | 氧化铜
descriptionEn: The CT-exclusive Mag-7 delivers a devastating amount of damage at close range. Its rapid magazine-style reloads make it a great tactical choice. It has been painted with blue and rose gold solid colors. I'm trying something different here, tell me what you think - Yukako, Gunsmith
descriptionZh: 反恐精英专用的 Mag-7 带来毁灭性的近距离杀伤力。它快速的弹仓式装弹方式使其成为一个不错的战术选择。 它采用了蓝与玫瑰金纯色涂装。 这次试了大胆配色，求反馈！——枪匠友佳子
